title: Multi-rule AND test
description: Boundary fixture — a question gated on two triggers combined with enable_behavior=all (AND). Used by the renderer-coverage E2E suite to verify LHC-Forms (and quickq-forms) correctly suppress the gated question until both triggers are satisfied.
name: MultiruleANDtest

item.text: Cessation counseling follow-up — when did you last try to quit?
